textByHashes.7900632daae6ca197c0775e910fdbc6b187cc4b2: Surface-dweller! You may not pass through that door!
textByHashes.5772a9d9e0e8d4319e9f6c9724c0f2b98f0c8727: Surface-dweller! You should leave the mines now!
textByHashes.7154c249c2355a25071994b0c4010c191bc1aefa: I'm keeping an eye on you, surface-dweller.
textByHashes.7db3311e56b9e14a4662b0ee26251b038824aaa0: Surface-dweller! You will never find your way into the city of Dorgesh-Kaan!
textByHashes.942e8bd32599d83995348912805c0113bfecb56a: Well, yes, but you'll never find your way in!
textByHashes.89d873c4541dbc7fc4e62a3e4b24fd5f5e00addd: Oh yes, so you are. I'd better say something different.
textByHashes.ce7e7fb19531b9e0da83599984522af9f4094d09: Surface-dweller! You will easily find your way into the city of Dorgesh-Kaan!
